close_reason: Added per-method doc comments on try_sign with async bridging details
description: The performance and blocking contract of try_sign() — that each call spawns a new OS thread with a fresh tokio current-thread runtime — is documented only in the crate-level module doc. The try_sign() methods themselves have no doc comments at all (the trait impl inherits nothing visible). Callers reading the method signature alone do not know that try_sign() will block the calling thread and incur thread-creation overhead on every call, which is a critical performance contract for any hot signing path.
title: try_sign() async-bridging contract missing from per-method docs
